title: N@buwshazban #5021
definition:
Nebushasban = "Nebo delivers me"

 1) one of the officers of Nebuchadnezzar at the capture of Jerusalem
nasbUsage:
Definition: Nebushasban = "Nebo delivers me"

 1) one of the officers of Nebuchadnezzar at the capture of Jerusalem

    NASB:  O Nebo, deliver me, a Bab. officer
